pages.text: A fenced grass field with a hay bale, a water trough, and a small herd inside — the core early farm island. One throw gives you a breeding pair of $(bold)cows$(), $(bold)sheep$() or $(bold)pigs$() (or a mixed pair).

$(bold)Two ways to make it$()$(br)Whichever you catch first: $(item)Wool$() (from a sheep) or $(item)Raw Beef$() (from a cow), plus planks and dirt. Then breed the pair with wheat (cows/sheep) or carrots (pigs) and you're self-sufficient for food and leather.
